description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines four jobs—JRuby 9.1, Ruby 2.2, Ruby 2.3, and Ruby 2.4—each running in the default test stage. Use the jruby:9.1-alpine image for the JRuby job and ruby:2.2-alpine, ruby:3.3-alpine, ruby:2.4-alpine images for the respective Ruby jobs. In every job run a before_script that installs ragel and build-base via apk, conditionally adds openjdk8 when the INSTALL_OPENJDK variable is true, installs bundler with gem, prints ruby, gem, and bundler versions, and runs bundle install --path vendor --retry=3, caching the vendor/ruby directory. Then execute the script command bundle exec rake. Set the variable INSTALL_OPENJDK to "true" only for the JRuby 9.1 job. No additional rules, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
